import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ n: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, n)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    mut inserted = false
    while j < xs.len()
      match xs.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if not inserted and n < v
          result = list.push(result, n)
          inserted = true
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, n)
    end
    result
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut sorted_unique: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      sorted_unique = insert_sorted(sorted_unique, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < sorted_unique.len()
  match sorted_unique.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
